query:
SELECT 
  l.id,
  l.nome,
  l.status,
  l.corretorId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_ups WHERE leadId = l.id AND status = 'pendente') as followups_pendentes
FROM leads l
WHERE l.corretorId = 1
  AND l.status = 'em_atendimento'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM follow_ups WHERE leadId = l.id AND status = 'pendente'
  )
LIMIT 10;

WHERE l.corretorId = 1

  AND NOT EXISTS (
